resources.string: Available in many languages, which change as the video plays
\'Flying towards Mount Pilatus.mp4\' becomes \'Flying towards Mount Pilatus\'
\'Japan - Deep snow in Hokkaido.jpg\' becomes \'Japan - Deep snow in Hokkaido\'
Play random segments of long videos

string-array.name: limit_Longer_videos_summaries
string-array.item: Obey limit - skip to the next video when the limit is reached
Ignore limit - if a video is longer than the set limit, it will be played until the end
Random segment - if a video is longer than the limit, a random part of the video will be played\n(eg. with a 2min limit, a 6min video can have 3 segments - one will be randomly played)

resources.string: Blackout screen, fade out media and overlays
